events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: conductor selection & sizing, wrong insulation type for wet location. NEC 310 requires conductors in wet locations to be approved for wet locations (e.g., THWN, XHHW, etc.). If wrong insulation type used in wet location, non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 70. Value 0. Confidence high. Findings and actions.

    "Conductor insulation type is not approved for a wet location, violating NEC 310 wet-location requirements",

    "Identify all conductors routed through wet/damp locations and replace with wet-location-rated insulation (e.g., THWN-2, XHHW-2)",

    "Re-inspect corrected conductor selection before walls are closed"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 310 requires conductors installed in wet locations to be of a type approved for wet locations. Using the wrong insulation type in a wet location is a code violation and a potential safety hazard, so the roughed-in work fails compliance.",
